Class ActionPriorityTask

java.lang.Object
adris.altoclef.tasks.speedrun.beatgame.prioritytask.tasks.PriorityTask
adris.altoclef.tasks.speedrun.beatgame.prioritytask.tasks.ActionPriorityTask
public class ActionPriorityTask extends PriorityTask
most general way to create priority tasks (basically all other subclasses could be replaced by this). Returns a task and a priority given a PriorityCalculator and TaskProvider (kinda works like the old GatherResource I guess)
